name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for SpriteBoy Studio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]".

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here. Mention which mode (Build / Animate / View) the feature would live in.
